messages.shareCopied: Share link copied to the clipboard.
messages.exportCreated: Export job created. Track its progress in export history.
messages.recorderReady: The recording target was sent to the extension. Switch to your app and open the extension to start cross-tab recording.
messages.extensionNotDetected: The DocFlow browser extension was not detected. Install or reload it, then refresh this page.
messages.recorderFailed: Could not set the recording target. Make sure the extension is connected.
messages.screenshotCompressed: The screenshot was compressed automatically and added.
messages.screenshotInvalid: This image could not be read. Choose a valid PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
messages.screenshotTooLarge: The image is still too large after automatic compression. Choose another image.
messages.screenshotUploadFailed: The screenshot could not be uploaded. Please try again.

top.editTitle: Click to edit the demo name

export.title: Share & export
export.subtitle: Manage resource details, published versions, and export history
export.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose and audience for this demo
export.unpublished: This resource is not published yet. Publish it to create a public link.
export.syncHint: Current edits are synced before export
export.creatingDescription: Syncing the current version and creating an export job…
export.empty: Files and job status will appear here after your first export.

presentation.empty: This demo has no steps yet
presentation.emptyHint: Enter edit mode to add screenshots or record with the browser extension.

steps.emptyHint: Record a DOM demo with the browser extension or upload a screenshot.

content.copyDescription: Used in the player, documentation, and exports
content.timingDescription: Controls how long this step appears in exported video
content.smartCopyDescription: Regenerate only this step without changing other steps

hotspot.objectsDescription: A step can contain multiple interactive areas
hotspot.behaviorDescription: Configure how viewers trigger the hotspot and what happens next
hotspot.rebindHint: Switch to Edit hotspot, then click an element in the page to bind a new target.
hotspot.positionDescription: Coordinates and size relative to the recorded viewport
hotspot.spotlightHint: Dim page content outside the hotspot

tooltip.copyDescription: Instructions displayed next to the hotspot
tooltip.layoutDescription: Automatically avoids viewport edges or uses a chosen direction
tooltip.arrowHint: Connect the guide card to its page element

theme.brandDescription: Use one visual color for hotspots, progress, and primary actions
theme.cardDescription: Control tooltip background and text contrast
theme.navigationDescription: Configure labels, backgrounds, and text colors for both buttons

animation.zoomDescription: Select an area to focus and enlarge during playback
animation.dragHint: Drag or resize the selection directly on the canvas
animation.mp4Hint: MP4 preserves the full zoom transition and hold. Higher values make the animation gentler.
animation.addHint: Add an area, then move and resize it on the canvas. Preview the 3-second zoom and verify that it contains the primary hotspot.
animation.autoplayDescription: Play the published demo continuously without viewer clicks
animation.autoplayHint: Advance steps using the timing below

ai.generateDescription: Analyze the full flow and complete titles, descriptions, and hotspot guidance
ai.generateAll: Generate copy for the full demo
ai.background: The job runs in the background and never blocks extension recording.
ai.reviewDescription: Compare the original and AI-generated content for the demo and every step
ai.noChanges: This job did not produce any applicable copy changes.
ai.suggestionsDescription: Review-only notices for possible sensitive information or flow-quality issues. They never change content automatically.
ai.internalAddressRisk: A possible internal IP address was detected. Confirm whether it should be redacted.
ai.accountRisk: A possible account identifier was detected. Confirm whether it should be redacted.
ai.credentialRisk: Possible credential information was detected. Confirm that it is fully redacted.
ai.redundant: AI thinks this step may be redundant. Review it manually.
ai.dataRulesHint: AI receives only redacted text and thumbnails and never overwrites manually edited fields.

mobileDock.label: Floating editor toolbar
mobileDock.resize: Drag vertically to resize the panel
